In the video ["Overcome the fear of public speaking"](https://www.linkedin.com/learning/refresh-your-workplace-social-skills/overcome-the-fear-of-public-speaking), Marielle Legair teaches how to boost confidence while speaking. The video emphasizes focusing on the message and preparing ahead of time.   For example, when preparing for a team meeting, a software engineer might outline key points about a project update, ensuring they convey the main ideas clearly while practicing their delivery. This preparation can help alleviate anxiety and allow for a more confident presentation.    What would an ideal outcome look like for your public speaking skills?
I aim to build confidence while speaking.

In the video ["Invest in your speaking skills"](https://www.linkedin.com/learning/super-connecting-the-secret-of-professional-networking/invest-in-your-speaking-skills), JaMarr Johnson and Madecraft teach about the importance of public speaking and provide tips on how to improve this skill. They emphasize the value of preparation and practice, focusing on major points rather than memorizing every word.   For example, when preparing for a presentation at work, a software engineer might outline key points about a new application feature they are developing, ensuring they convey the main ideas clearly while allowing room for natural conversation with the audience.
